settings.subtitle_text: Rinse. Strip. Glow. Each stage sets up the next

settings.description: Run the routine for 30 days. Love your whiter smile or your money back. No questions.

settings.answer_1: One routine in three stages. The Complete Kit has all of them: Elaren Purple Mouthwash to brighten on contact, enamel-safe Whitening Strips to lift set-in stains, and the hands-free LED device that accelerates every strip session. The Starter is the LED accelerator on its own. The Everything Bundle is the full system plus a 3-month supply of refills.
settings.question_2: How long does each step take?
settings.answer_2: The rinse takes about 30 seconds. The strips take around 30 minutes, and the LED device runs hands-free while they work, so stages 2 and 3 happen together while you get ready. The whole routine fits inside a normal morning.
settings.question_3: Is it safe for my enamel?
settings.answer_3: Yes. Every stage is gentle by design. The strips are enamel-safe, the purple mouthwash is alcohol-free, and both are made with sensitive teeth in mind. Stick to the timings on each pack for the best results.
settings.question_4: How do I use the routine?
settings.answer_4: Rinse. Strip. Glow. Swish the purple mouthwash for about 30 seconds for instant brightness. Apply the enamel-safe strips for around 30 minutes to lift the deeper stains. Slip in the LED device to accelerate the session, hands-free, while you get on with your morning. Each stage sets up the next.
settings.answer_5: Subscriptions always ship free express. Every Elaren order is covered by the Elaren Whitening Guarantee: love your whiter smile or your money back within 30 days, no questions.
settings.question_6: Will it work on coffee, tea, wine or smoking stains?
settings.answer_6: Yes. On natural teeth the system is built for exactly those stains. The purple rinse cancels yellow tones the moment you swish, and the enamel-safe strips do the deep work on set-in coffee, tea, red wine and smoking stains over a few weeks, with the LED device accelerating every session. Deeper or age-related discolouration takes longer, so keep your Day 1 photo to compare. Individual results vary.
settings.question_7: How long do the results last?
settings.answer_7: This is where the routine earns its keep. Strips on their own fade because coffee, tea, wine and smoking slowly re-stain everyone. The daily purple rinse keeps new stains from resettling between strip sessions, and on a subscription your refills keep arriving so the routine never stops. Skip, pause or cancel anytime. Individual results vary.
settings.question_8: Is it worth it compared to the dentist?
settings.answer_8: In-chair whitening can run into the hundreds and means booking time off. The whole Elaren system costs less than one visit, whitens at home on your schedule, and comes with a routine that keeps the result up instead of a one-off treatment. Every order is covered by the Elaren Whitening Guarantee: love your whiter smile or your money back within 30 days.
settings.question_9: How soon will I see a difference?
settings.answer_9: Stage 1 is instant: the purple rinse brightens the moment you swish, so you look better from day one. Stage 2 builds: most people see the strips make a visible difference after the first use, with deeper whitening over two to four weeks. Line your Day 30 up against a Day 1 photo, and if it is not visibly whiter the Elaren Whitening Guarantee has you covered: money back within 30 days. Individual results vary.

settings.text: A ROUTINE THAT FITS YOUR DAY

settings.title: Brighten now
settings.description: Stage 1. The purple rinse cancels yellow tones on contact, so you look brighter from day one while the real whitening builds underneath.

settings.title: Lift the stain
settings.description: Stage 2. Enamel-safe strips do the deep work on set-in coffee, tea, wine and smoking stains that a rinse alone cannot shift.

settings.title: Accelerate, hands-free
settings.description: Stage 3. The LED device boosts every strip session while you get on with your morning, so the routine fits your life.

settings.title: Keep it up
settings.description: Refills arrive on schedule so the routine never stops. Skip, pause or cancel anytime.

settings.subtitle: The rinse shows results today. The strips build them for good. The device makes sure you never skip a session.

settings.step_description: Swish the purple mouthwash for about 30 seconds. It cancels yellow tones on contact, so your smile looks brighter today.
Apply the enamel-safe strips for around 30 minutes. This is the stage that lifts set-in coffee, tea, wine and smoking stains.
Slip in the hands-free LED device to accelerate the strip session while you get ready. Easy enough to actually keep up.

settings.title: How it
settings.subtitle: Rinse. Strip. Glow. Each stage sets up the next.

settings.title: Purple is optical
settings.description: The purple pigment in the rinse cancels yellow tones on contact. It is instant, visual brightening, which is why you see a difference on day one while the deeper work happens underneath.

settings.title: Strips do the real lift
settings.description: The enamel-safe strips are the stage that lifts set-in stains from coffee, tea, red wine and smoking. Used on their own, strips fade fast because daily stains resettle. In the system, the daily rinse holds the line between sessions.

settings.title: LED keeps you consistent
settings.description: The hands-free LED device accelerates every strip session and makes the routine easy to repeat. Consistency is what turns week one progress into a result that lasts.

settings.title: Gentle at every stage
settings.description: Alcohol-free rinse, enamel-safe strips, nothing harsh. Made for sensitive teeth and everyday use.

settings.subtitle: Because no single product can do all three jobs.

settings.heading_text: Your routine never stops. Neither do your results.

settings.paragraph_text: Whiter teeth are not a one-off treatment. They are a routine. Subscribe to the Complete Kit and your rinse and strips refill automatically, so the stages keep working together and you never run out mid-routine. Skip a delivery, pause for a while, or cancel anytime from your account. No lock-in.

settings.step_description: Stage 3. The hands-free, rechargeable accelerator that boosts every strip session. Save 40% on it in the Complete Kit.
Stage 1. 20 single-use sachets. Purple cancels yellow on contact for instant brightness. Alcohol-free, fresh mint.
Stage 2. 42 enamel-safe strips, two per use. The deep-stain stage, gentle enough for sensitive teeth.

settings.subtitle: Every stage of the routine in your first box. Refills arrive automatically after.

settings.title: Brighter on contact
settings.description: The purple rinse cancels yellow tones the first time you swish, so your smile looks brighter while the strips start the deeper work.

settings.title: The strips get to work
settings.description: The enamel-safe strips begin lifting set-in stains, with the LED device accelerating every session. Most people notice the change this week.

settings.title: Someone comments on it
settings.description: The stages compound. The daily rinse keeps new stains from resettling while the strips keep lifting, and people start to notice.

settings.title: Side-by-side photo proof
settings.description: Line it up against your Day 1 photo. That is the compounded result of all three stages. If it is not visibly whiter, the Elaren Whitening Guarantee applies: full money-back, no questions. Individual results vary.

settings.question: Will it hurt?
settings.answer: Elaren is gentle at every stage. The strips are enamel-safe, the purple rinse is alcohol-free, and both are designed with sensitive teeth in mind. Follow the timings on pack and give your teeth a rest day if you ever feel sensitivity.

settings.question: Does it work on veneers or crowns?
settings.answer: No. Whitening only works on natural enamel, so Elaren won't change the colour of veneers, crowns or fillings. If most of your smile is dental work, this isn't the product for you. We would rather tell you now than refund you later.

settings.question: Is it safe for my enamel?
settings.answer: Yes. Every stage is gentle by design: enamel-safe strips and an alcohol-free rinse that suits daily use. Stick to the timings on each pack. If you have braces, or you are pregnant or breastfeeding, or whitening for someone under 18, check with your dentist first.

settings.question: How long does each step take?
settings.answer: The rinse takes about 30 seconds a day. The strips take around 30 minutes, and the hands-free LED device accelerates them while you get ready. The whole routine fits a normal morning.

settings.question: When do I see results?
settings.answer: Stage 1 is instant: the purple rinse brightens the moment you swish. Stage 2 builds: most people see a visible difference from the strips after the first use, with deeper whitening over a few weeks as the stages compound. Individual results vary.

settings.question: How do I cancel?
settings.answer: Manage everything from your account page. No lock-in. Skip a delivery, pause for a while, or cancel anytime, no emails or phone calls needed.
